# [Data quality] Always ensure your data is accurate before anyone using it 

## WAP pattern is how you ensure data correctness before exposing data to users

## There are 3 main types of data quality checks you can use

## Start your data quality journey by checking your output first

## [Project] Adding DQ checks to our dbt pipeline

## Save time by ensuring inputs to your pipeline are accurate

## Define how late your data can be (SLA)
